scripts.build: npm run build --workspace=apps/portfolio && npm run build --workspace=apps/maestros-del-salmon
scripts.lint: npm run lint --workspace=apps/portfolio && npm run lint --workspace=apps/maestros-del-salmon
scripts.typecheck: npx tsc -p apps/portfolio/tsconfig.json --noEmit && npx tsc -p apps/maestros-del-salmon/tsconfig.json --noEmit
